meaning: n.道德家,有道德的人,伦理学者
examples: Hobbes is a moralist, which seems odd in some ways.
He is a paradoxical aesthete as well as a paradoxical moralist.
Luckly, no major damage seems to have occurred to the House of the Moralist.
But moral stands are risky and have a way of bouncing back against the chief moralist in nasty ways.
Mr Ferman was a moralist but he was aware that the movie business sought a smooth passage for its expensive products.
